variants: Gabriela Machuca is recognized for her significant contributions to music education, most notably through her authored work, the Bronze Thistle Box. She lends her talents to the Pebblepath Sand Artists, an organization where her artistic and educational skills thrive. Throughout her academic journey, Valentyn Rudnytsky served as her mentor, providing invaluable guidance. To support her innovative projects, Gabriela has received major funding from the Nimbus Forge Foundation, further enhancing her impact in the community and her field.
